name: ALS Analysis and Assessment Survey Study
rationale: ALS Analysis and Assessment Survey Study is a survey/registry-style observational dataset.

name: ALS Compute Dataset
rationale: ALS Compute aggregate/reference dataset with ALS and FTD disease cohorts summarized at consortium level.

name: ASSESS ALL ALS Dataset
rationale: ASSESS ALL ALS prospective observational study enrolling symptomatic ALS and control participants.

name: A Study to Evaluate Efficacy Safety and Tolerability of CK-2127107 in Patients With ALS (SDTM)
rationale: Phase 2 randomized dose-ranging trial: placebo plus 150, 300, and 450 mg reldesemtiv arms.

name: A Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Reldesemtiv in Patients With ALS (Phase 3) (SDTM)
rationale: COURAGE-ALS Phase 3 randomized trial: reldesemtiv and placebo arms.

name: Abnormal RNA stability in amyotrophic lateral sclerosis
rationale: Current disease annotations list ALS and Control cohorts in GSE115310.

name: Clinical Trial Ceftriaxone in Subjects With ALS (OMOP)
rationale: OMOP representation of the same ceftriaxone ALS clinical trial with treatment and placebo/control arms.

name: Clinical Trial Ceftriaxone in Subjects With ALS
rationale: Ceftriaxone ALS clinical trial: ceftriaxone and placebo/control arms.

name: Clinical Trial of Topiramate in ALS
rationale: Randomized placebo-controlled topiramate trial: topiramate and placebo arms.

name: Developing Novel Strategies for Personalized Treatment and Prevention of ALS  Leveraging the Global Exposome  Genome  Epigenome  Metabolome  and Inflammasome with Data Science in a Case Control Cohort
rationale: Title and annotations describe an ALS case/control cohort (dbGaP phs004288.v1.p1).

name: Divergent impacts of C9orf72 repeat expansion on neurons and glia in ALS and FTD (bulk H3K27ac ChIP-seq)
rationale: Current disease annotations list ALS and Control cohorts for bulk H3K27ac ChIP-seq.

name: Divergent impacts of C9orf72 repeat expansion on neurons and glia in ALS and FTD (bulk RNA-seq)
rationale: C9-ALS, C9-FTD, and control postmortem cortex cohorts in GSE219278/Nat Commun paper.

name: Divergent impacts of C9orf72 repeat expansion on neurons and glia in ALS and FTD (snATAC-seq)
rationale: C9-ALS, C9-FTD, and control postmortem cortex cohorts in GSE219279/Nat Commun paper.

name: Divergent impacts of C9orf72 repeat expansion on neurons and glia in ALS and FTD (snRNA-seq)
rationale: C9-ALS, C9-FTD, and control postmortem cortex cohorts in GSE219280/Nat Commun paper.

name: Loss of Nuclear TDP-43 Is Associated with Decondensation of LINE Retrotransposons (ATAC-Seq)
rationale: FTD/ALS postmortem TDP-43-negative nuclei cohorts in GSE126541; no explicit healthy-control annotation present.

name: Loss of Nuclear TDP-43 Is Associated with Decondensation of LINE Retrotransposons (RNA-Seq)
rationale: FTD/ALS postmortem TDP-43-negative nuclei RNA-seq cohorts in GSE126542; no explicit healthy-control annotation present.

name: Neurovascular dysfunction in GRN-associated frontotemporal dementia identified by single-nucleus RNA-sequencing of human cerebral cortex
rationale: FTD-GRN and control human cerebral cortex cohorts in GSE163122/Nat Neurosci paper.

name: PREVENT ALL ALS Dataset
rationale: PREVENT ALL ALS prospective observational study enrolling at-risk individuals and controls.

name: Postmortem Cortex Samples Identify Distinct Molecular Subtypes of ALS - Retrotransposon Activation, Oxidative Stress, and Activated Glia
rationale: Current disease annotations list ALS, FTD, Control, Pre-fALS, Alzheimer's Disease, Other Neurological Disorders, and Other Motor Neuron Disease.

name: RNA methylation influences TDP43 binding and disease pathogenesis in models of amyotrophic lateral sclerosis and frontotemporal dementia
rationale: ALS/FTD disease-model RNA methylation study; no explicit control cohort in current disease annotation.

name: Target ALS
rationale: Target ALS GNHS natural-history dataset with ALS and control cohorts.

name: Trehalose Biomarker Dataset
rationale: Trehalose expanded-access biomarker dataset; open-label non-randomized treatment cohort.

name: Trehalose Expanded Access Protocol Dataset
rationale: Trehalose expanded-access protocol; open-label non-randomized treatment cohort.

name: Truncated stathmin-2 is a marker of TDP-43 pathology in frontotemporal dementia
rationale: Current disease annotations list ALS, FTD, Control, Pre-fALS, Alzheimer's Disease, Parkinson's Disease, Other Neurological Disorders, and Other Motor Neuron Disease.

name: Unexpected similarities between C9ORF72 and sporadic forms of ALS-FTD suggest a common disease mechanism
rationale: Current disease annotations list ALS, FTD, Control, Pre-fALS, Parkinson's Disease, and Alzheimer's Disease cohorts.
